title: Cottage Cheese Alfredo
description: Your favorite creamy pasta gets a high-protein, low-fat upgrade with blended cottage cheese Alfredo sauce, fresh baby spinach, and Parmesan cheese.

ingredients.item: kosher salt, plus more for pasta water
crushed red pepper flakes, for serving

instructions: Cook fettuccine in a large pot of boiling salted water until very al dente. Reserve 1/2 cup pasta water, then drain pasta, transfer to a bowl, and toss with olive oil.

Blend cottage cheese, milk, Parmesan, garlic, butter, flour, and 1 tsp salt in a blender until smooth. Pour sauce into a large skillet over medium heat, simmer for 8 to 10 minutes until thickened, then stir in spinach until wilted.
Add cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to coat with sauce, adding reserved pasta water as needed to reach desired consistency.
Divide pasta into serving bowls and sprinkle with crushed red pepper flakes before serving.
